text:
I visited Dental Studio Vučetić in Kotor and was extremely satisfied with the services.The doctor also speaks English, which really satisfied me.Everything was done incredibly fast, precisely and very professionally.The procedures were comfortable with no unnecessary waiting.Highly recommended!
Рекомендую эту стоматологию, врач профессионал, работает очень быстро и качественно, хорошая цена за услуги.

translations.ru:
I visited Dental Studio Vučetić in Kotor and was extremely satisfied with the services.The doctor also speaks English, which really satisfied me.Everything was done incredibly fast, precisely and very professionally.The procedures were comfortable with no unnecessary waiting.Highly recommended!
Рекомендую эту стоматологию, врач профессионал, работает очень быстро и качественно, хорошая цена за услуги.
translations.sr: Posetio sam Dental Studio Vučetić u Kotoru i bio sam izuzetno zadovoljan uslugama. Doktor takođe govori engleski, što me je dodatno obradovalo. Sve je urađeno neverovatno brzo, precizno i veoma profesionalno. Procedure su bile udobne, bez nepotrebnog čekanja. Toplo preporučujem!
translations.sr_cyrl: Посетио сам Dental Studio Vučetić у Котору и био сам изузетно задовољан услугама. Доктор такође говори енглески, што ме је додатно обрадовало. Све је урађено невероватно брзо, прецизно и веома професионално. Процедуре су биле удобне, без непотребног чекања. Топло препоручујем!
translations.en:
I visited Dental Studio Vučetić in Kotor and was extremely satisfied with the services. The doctor also speaks English, which really satisfied me. Everything was done incredibly fast, precisely and very professionally. The procedures were comfortable with no unnecessary waiting. Highly recommended!
I recommend this dental clinic — the doctor is a professional, works very fast and at a high quality, with good prices for the services.
translations.de: Ich habe das Dental Studio Vučetić in Kotor besucht und war äußerst zufrieden mit den Leistungen. Der Arzt spricht auch Englisch, was mich besonders gefreut hat. Alles wurde unglaublich schnell, präzise und sehr professionell erledigt. Die Behandlungen waren angenehm, ohne unnötige Wartezeiten. Sehr empfehlenswert!
translations.tr: Kotor'daki Dental Studio Vučetić'i ziyaret ettim ve hizmetten son derece memnun kaldım. Doktor ayrıca İngilizce konuşuyor, bu da beni çok memnun etti. Her şey inanılmaz hızlı, hassas ve çok profesyonelce yapıldı. İşlemler rahattı, gereksiz bekleme yoktu. Şiddetle tavsiye ederim!
